name: sangfor-xdr-v2-0-45
description: OctoBus package for Sangfor XDR incident, alert, asset, risk-host, and vulnerability investigation APIs.

sangfor.xdr.v2_0_45.SangforXdrService/Ge.name: get-incident-context
sangfor.xdr.v2_0_45.SangforXdrService/Ge.description: Get incident proof and related process, file, host, IP, and DNS entities.

sangfor.xdr.v2_0_45.SangforXdrService/Ge.name: get-alert-context
sangfor.xdr.v2_0_45.SangforXdrService/Ge.description: Get evidence and complete context for one XDR alert.

sangfor.xdr.v2_0_45.SangforXdrService/Se.name: search-risk-hosts
sangfor.xdr.v2_0_45.SangforXdrService/Se.description: Search hosts currently assessed as risky by XDR.
